{% extends "marketplace/vendor/base.html" %} {% load i18n %} {% block title %}{% if category %}{% trans "编辑分类" %}{% else %}{% trans "新增分类" %}{% endif %} · {{ vendor.company_name }}{% endblock %} {% block extra_vendor_css %} .cat-form-hero { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f172a,#7c3aed 55%,#c084fc); color:#fff; border-radius:26px; padding:26px; margin-bottom:24px; box-shadow:0 18px 45px rgba(15,23,42,.20); } .content-card { border-radius:24px !important; box-shadow:0 16px 44px rgba(15,23,42,.08) !important; border:1px solid rgba(124,58,237,.12); } .content-card .form-control, .content-card .form-select { min-height:48px; border-radius:16px !important; border:1.5px solid #dbe3f3; box-shadow:none; } .content-card .form-control:focus, .content-card .form-select:focus { border-color:#7c3aed; box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(124,58,237,.10); } {% endblock %} {% block vendor_content %}
{% trans "分类工作台" %}

{% if category %}{% trans "编辑分类" %}{% else %}{% trans "新增分类" %}{% endif %}

{% trans "返回分类列表" %}
{% csrf_token %}
{% if form_state.errors.name %}
{{ form_state.errors.name }}
{% endif %}
{% if category %}
{% trans "创建后无法更改所属版块。" %}
{% endif %}
{% trans "取消" %}
{% endblock %}
